title: Blogs
metaDescription: Articles and insights on psychotherapy, mental health, and wellness from Voice Awareness.
body:
Welcome to the Voice Awareness blog — articles on psychotherapy, mental health, anxiety, trauma recovery, stress management, and personal growth.

## Latest posts

### [Anxiety](/anxiety)

It is funny how anxiety is this one word, but it has an impact to flip your world upside down when it takes over you. A personal reflection on the "hamster on a wheel" feeling, coping mechanisms, and why you are not alone.

[Read the full article →](/anxiety)

---

You can also connect with me through [Psychology Today](https://www.psychologytoday.com/ca/therapists/nayab-tahir-richmond-hill-on/1395672) or [First Session](https://www.firstsession.com/therapists/nayab-tahir).

To book a consultation, visit [Jane App](https://voiceawareness.janeapp.com/#staff_member/1).
